author: hi0b
content: Plan: Convert root Cargo.toml to a hybrid workspace (root keeps the v1 'crossbridge' package, adds [workspace] members = ['.', 'crossbridge-protocol']). Add new crossbridge-protocol/ crate with: (1) message types per .design/protocol.md — Register, RegisterResponse, Notification, SupervisorMessage, ClientRequest, SubmitIssue, SubmitAnswer, AnswerComment, Attachment, ServerResponse; (2) length-prefixed framing helpers (4-byte BE u32 prefix, 16 MiB cap) — sync write_message_sync/read_message_sync over std Read/Write, async write_message/read_message over tokio AsyncRead/AsyncWrite (gated behind 'async' feature, default-on); (3) custom ProtocolError enum (Io, Serialize, FrameTooLarge). Dependencies: serde, postcard, tokio (optional). The v1 binary does NOT depend on the protocol crate yet — v1 is unchanged, the new crate is staged for v2 supervisor/server/client. Tests cover roundtrip serialization for each message variant + framing edge cases (oversized read/write rejected, sync↔async interop).
